languages.original_text: "No, Rogue Trader, I made a vow to you. My mind is too old and anguished. I have no strength left in me to flee — Amsanct awaits."

languages.text: "Нет, Вольный Торговец, я дал вам обет. Мой разум слишком стар и истерзан. Во мне больше нет сил бежать — Амсанкт ждет".
"No, Rogue Trader, I made a vow to you. My mind is too old and anguished. I have no strength left in me to flee — Amsanct awaits."
languages.original_text: "Нет, Вольный Торговец, я дал вам обет. Мой разум слишком стар и истерзан. Во мне больше нет сил бежать — Амсанкт ждет".

traits.locale_text: "No, Rogue Trader, I made a vow to you. My mind is too old and anguished. I have no strength left in me to flee — Amsanct awaits."
"No, Rogue Trader, I made a vow to you. My mind is too old and anguished. I have no strength left in me to flee — Amsanct awaits."
"No, Rogue Trader, I made a vow to you. My mind is too old and anguished. I have no strength left in me to flee — Amsanct awaits."

languages.text: «No, Comerciante, le hice un juramento. Mi mente está muy vieja y angustiada. No me quedan fuerzas para huir... Amsanct me aguarda».
languages.original_text: "No, Rogue Trader, I made a vow to you. My mind is too old and anguished. I have no strength left in me to flee — Amsanct awaits."

traits.locale_text: «No, Comerciante, le hice un juramento. Mi mente está muy vieja y angustiada. No me quedan fuerzas para huir... Amsanct me aguarda».

languages.text: “不会，行商浪人，我向您发过誓。我的心智太苍老、太痛苦了。我已没有力气逃离——阿姆桑克特在等着我。”
languages.original_text: "No, Rogue Trader, I made a vow to you. My mind is too old and anguished. I have no strength left in me to flee — Amsanct awaits."

traits.locale_text: “不会，行商浪人，我向您发过誓。我的心智太苍老、太痛苦了。我已没有力气逃离——阿姆桑克特在等着我。”

languages.text: « Non, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, je vous ai fait un serment. J'ai l'esprit trop vieux et angoissé. Je n'ai plus la force de fuir ; Amsanct m'attend. »
languages.original_text: "No, Rogue Trader, I made a vow to you. My mind is too old and anguished. I have no strength left in me to flee — Amsanct awaits."

traits.locale_text: « Non, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}, je vous ai fait un serment. J'ai l'esprit trop vieux et angoissé. Je n'ai plus la force de fuir ; Amsanct m'attend. »

languages.text: "Nein, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, ich habe Euch etwas gelobt. Mein Verstand ist zu alt und gepeinigt. Ich habe keine Kraft mehr, zu fliehen — Amsanct wartet."
languages.original_text: "No, Rogue Trader, I made a vow to you. My mind is too old and anguished. I have no strength left in me to flee — Amsanct awaits."

traits.locale_text: "Nein, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, ich habe Euch etwas gelobt. Mein Verstand ist zu alt und gepeinigt. Ich habe keine Kraft mehr, zu fliehen — Amsanct wartet."

languages.text: 「ローグ・トレーダーよ、私はあなたに誓った。私の心は老いさらばえ、苦悩している。逃げる力も残っていない。アムサンクトが待っている。」
languages.original_text: "No, Rogue Trader, I made a vow to you. My mind is too old and anguished. I have no strength left in me to flee — Amsanct awaits."

traits.locale_text: 「ローグ・トレーダーよ、私はあなたに誓った。私の心は老いさらばえ、苦悩している。逃げる力も残っていない。アムサンクトが待っている。」

languages.text: "Karşılaşmayacaksın Hür Tacir. Sana söz verdim. Zihnim çok yaşlı ve ıstıraplı. Kaçacak gücüm kalmadı. Amsanct bekliyor."
languages.original_text: "No, Rogue Trader, I made a vow to you. My mind is too old and anguished. I have no strength left in me to flee — Amsanct awaits."

traits.locale_text: "Karşılaşmayacaksın Hür Tacir. Sana söz verdim. Zihnim çok yaşlı ve ıstıraplı. Kaçacak gücüm kalmadı. Amsanct bekliyor."
